err_invalid_pw: Geen geldig wachtwoord. Probeer het opnieuw.
err_lx: Code {{code}}: Portemonneegegevens ontbreken. Herstel je portemonnee.
recovery_dialog_body: Your browser environment has changed. Open SSP Key on your phone and approve the recovery request to unlock your wallet.
recovery_denied_body: The recovery request was denied on SSP Key.
recovery_timeout_body: SSP Key didn't respond in time. Make sure the app is open and try again.
